text: 称号「『決断』ビギナー」を取得

称号「『決断』ビギナー」を取得しよう！

※チャレンジクエスト「MISSION:決断」の
　ミッションを３つ以上クリアで
　称号カウンター係員ラケシスか

Acquire the Title "Decision Beginner"!
Note: This Title can be obtained by clearing
three or more Missions of the Challenge Quest
"MISSION: Decision" and then speaking to Lachesis
at the Title Counter.
